title.en: In this way, the Realm Court will not trouble him.

content.en:
A hierarchical force like the Old Sun Realm Mountain, if it doesn't have the strength, it will fall into the fate of the Old Sun Realm God.

Even if the Old Sun Mountain was created by the gods of the Old Sun Realm, it was not a family-level force, so it was too normal for this situation to occur.

......

Ye Tian didn't know the fate of the gods of the old Sun Realm, and he didn't pay attention to this matter anymore.

He had already obtained the material he wanted, which was the eternal Dao seed of the gods of the Old Sun Realm.

Of course, what he cared about was not the Eternal Dao Seed itself, but the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal substance on the Eternal Dao Seed, and he wanted to obtain these substances and study them to see the effect of this substance.

And he couldn't take the eternal Dao seed of the old Sun Realm god from the beginning, so when the old Sun Realm god couldn't bear it and wanted to turn into a demon seed, he would make a move.

In this way, the Realm Court will not trouble him.

But no one could have imagined that Ye Tian would actually want to devour the Demon Crystal, a substance that every Eternal Realm God Realm feared.

Terran Holy Country.

After Ye Tian came back, he gathered the substance of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal from the Eternal Dao Seed of the Old Sun Realm God.

It turned out that it was very difficult to extract, and it was necessary to directly refine the eternal Dao seed of the old Sun Realm God before this substance could be touched.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian directly swallowed the Eternal Dao Seed of the Old Sun Realm God, and in this way, the substance of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal was entrenched in Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed.

At this time, this substance was rapidly affecting Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed, wanting to make Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed become a demon seed, but no matter how it affected, it couldn't affect it.

Ye Tian didn't have the slightest demon seed, and he could also feel that this substance was improving his Eternal Dao Seed, and the effect was very good.

"Refining!"

Ye Tian used the Eternal Dao Seed to continuously refine this substance, and the faster the refining speed, the faster the impact.

If it was another Eternal Realm God Realm, if he dared to refine like this, he would turn into a demon seed in an instant, but Ye Tian was not afraid at all.

It didn't take long for these Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances to be exhausted by Ye Tian.

"It's gone!"

Ye Tian was a little disappointed, there was too little Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material in the Eternal Dao Seed of the Old Sun Realm God, at most it was enough for him to stuff his teeth.

However, it was this Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance that made the Old Sun Realm God useless.

"Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Material, the Realm God Realm should be able to trade, right?"

Ye Tian pondered.

He didn't have time to go to the Demon Seed Abyss to collect the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal material, it was too difficult to find.

However, if you go to the transaction and acquire it yourself, you may be able to acquire it.

According to his understanding, the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal itself is a substance that exists in a variety of resources, such as some special ores and special plants contain this substance, the most common of which is the substance of the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal.

And the Demon Seed Abyss will contain the material materials containing the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal into weapons, such as the Xuan Devouring Demon Blade is one of the Eternal Demon Treasure level weapons, which is not lethal to the Demon Seed, but it can be a huge threat to the Eternal Dao Species.

If you don't be able to withstand the Xuan Devouring Demon Blade and are injured to the Eternal Dao Seed, it will be over.

After such a long period of time between the Realm God Realm and the Demon Seed Abyss, many forces have definitely collected the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material or weapons containing this substance.

So, Ye Tian came to Moyun Valley again to collect this kind of substance.

Of course, he advertised that he wanted to do research.

Sure enough, he soon found the Eternal Realm God Realm who was willing to trade this substance.

In fact, many forces have definitely studied this substance, but they don't dare to test it with the Eternal Dao Seed, or the enemy's Eternal Dao Seed, but the final result is definitely not very friendly.

Nowadays, some forces do not want to study it, so they naturally want to take it out and trade it.

Ye Tian used some resources to trade with them, and he was still very valuable, so he traded with these forces again and again, obtained various materials containing the substance of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal, and even acquired a Xuan Devouring Demon Blade weapon, paying a lot of treasure resources.

this day.

An Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level powerhouse from Momen came to trade with Ye Tian, and he had some Xuandevouring Demon Crystals in his hand.

Ye Tian also took out a lot of resources in exchange for these Xuan Devouring Demon Crystals.

Ye Tian returned to the Terran Holy Kingdom with these Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances.

This time, if he purchased a large number of these Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material materials, he would definitely be suspicious of some forces, and even Momen might suspect him.

However, these forces didn't know what he was going to do with these devouring demon crystal substances, and they wouldn't deal with him.

No one would have expected that he would use these Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances to enhance the Eternal Dao Seed.

......

Terran Holy Country.

Ye Tian was in retreat to cultivate, and the gods of the outer world thought at most that he was studying the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, and at this moment he was using these substances to refine his Eternal Dao Seed.

He continued to absorb the Profound Devouring Demon Crystal substance, and the Eternal Dao Seed was constantly refined, coupled with the refining of those Eternal Demon Pillars and the Chilin Ancient Spear, the speed at which his Eternal Dao Seed was refined was too fast, far surpassing the past.

According to this efficiency, at most more than 10 billion Dao Era years, he can raise the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit.

"Great, as long as I raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, I can cultivate the fourth Eternal Realm Spirit and impact the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level cultivator!" Ye Tian was secretly excited.

The years passed.

Ye Tian has been very low-key for a period of time, and he has also made the Eternal Dao Realm of the Terran Holy Kingdom low-key, but nothing big has happened.

Gradually, the 10 billion solstice years passed.

During this period of time, the Terran Holy Kingdom gave birth to several half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, which can be regarded as a happy event!

At this time, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed was not far from refining to the limit, and his strength was much stronger than that of (Wang Wang Zhao).

"With my current strength, I should have a chance to pass the seventh round of the assessment of the Xuanxing Holy Gate Inheritance Land!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he was ready to go through the seventh round of assessment again.

......

The Land of the Inheritance of the Holy Gate of the Stars.

Ye Tian went in again and came to the seventh round of assessment.

Soon, one figure after another appeared, each of which was comparable to the middle-level powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm who condensed the five Eternal Realm spirits.

Ye Tian kept fighting with them, and he was also suppressed, but it was not as miserable as before.

Subsequently, Ye Tian burned everything to fight, killed this group of figures, and killed the first figure at a certain price.

After that, one figure after another fell into Ye Tian's hands.

In the end, Ye Tian killed all the opponents in the seventh round of assessment at a heavy price and successfully passed the seventh round.
